flashcards.front: What is the purpose of the schedule clause in OpenMP?
flashcards.back: The schedule clause controls how loop iterations are distributed among threads in a parallel for construct.

flashcards.front: Name the four main types of OpenMP scheduling strategies.
flashcards.back: Static, dynamic, guided, and auto scheduling.

flashcards.front: What is the key difference between static and dynamic scheduling?
flashcards.back: Static scheduling pre-distributes work at compile/start time, while dynamic scheduling assigns work at runtime as threads become available.

flashcards.front: What OpenMP directive creates an explicit task?

flashcards.back: It causes the current task to wait until all of its child tasks have completed execution.
